summary.one_line: Theta Gold Mines secures US$7 million in funding through equity raises from cornerstone investors and directors.
key_points: Total funding received: US$7 million (A$10.3 million).
Tranche Three: US$6 million from Cornerstone Investors.
Director Participation: US$1 million from Non-Executive Director.
Tranche Three consists of 66,184,225 shares issued.
Cornerstone Investors include Hongkong Ruihua Investment Management Limited.
Director shares issued: 9,714,821 shares.
Effective issue price per share for all participants: A$0.155.
Investors granted 27,808,499 attaching unlisted options.
Options have an expiry date of 10 October 2027.
Shares held in voluntary escrow for 24 months.
Equity raised as part of total ~A$51.4 million fundraising.
Shareholder approval obtained at AGM on 28 November 2025.
Newly issued shares do not utilize existing capacity under ASX Listing Rule 7.1.
Funds aimed to advance TGME Gold Mine Project.
Notable increase in the total number of issued shares affecting ownership structure.

price_sensitive.reason: Includes information on key project updates and financing that could impact stock price.

importance.reason: Outlines project economics, funding requirements, and construction milestones relevant for investment analysis.

summary.one_line: Theta Gold Mines Limited presents significant project updates and financing details at the 2026 Mining Conference.
key_points: Bill Guy, Chairman, presented at the 2026 Mining Investment Conference.
Core project: TGME Gold Mine in South Africa with strong historical production.
Current resources: 6.1Moz gold resource at 4.17g/t Au.
Pre-production funding: US$30M raised in equity, US$80M debt facility under negotiation.
Construction of a new gold processing plant is underway, targeting Q4 2026 commissioning.
First gold production expected in Q1 2027.
NVP (10%) of the project at US$2,884/oz gold price projected at US$455M, post-tax.
Strong planned production of 90-100koz per annum over a 13.1-year mine life.
All-in sustaining cost (AISC) estimated at US$1,181/oz.
Expected payback period of 29 months from start of mining.
Key permits for operations secured; existing infrastructure will reduce development costs.
Environmental commitments include biodiversity programs and community engagement.
Initial mining planned to target surface rock dumps leading to early cash flows.

numeric_facts.source_snippet: Combined Mineral Resources Statement
Robust Economics
Project Economics at Various Gold Prices
Robust Production Profile

catalysts_next_12m: First gold production scheduled for Q1 2027.
risks_headwinds: Commodity price volatility impacting project economics.
summary.market_impact_assessment: Positive updates on construction and financing are expected to boost investor confidence and potentially increase share price due to strong future cash flow projections.

notes: Key financial metrics and project timelines provided are highly relevant for investment decisions.
